PowerShell(python -c "import torch, zipfile, io; z=zipfile.ZipFile\(r'version_history\\4_key_and_guard\\zips\\4_key_and_guard_ppo_1.zip'\); sd=torch.load\(io.BytesIO\(z.read\('policy.pth'\)\), map_location='cpu'\); k=[x for x in sd if 'features_extractor.cnn.0.weight' in x][0]; print\('first conv weight shape:', tuple\(sd[k].shape\), '-> input channels =', sd[k].shape[1]\)")
